productDisplayName: Casio Sheen Women Silver Analogue Watches (SH167) SHN-3017D-1ADR
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel back, has a fixed bezel with stone embellishments along the rimDial style: Black dial with embellished detailFeatures: A screw to reset time, alarm and timer, two subdialsStrap style: Silver-toned bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Casio caseWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase
